index_page_content: ****Bitsika Crypto Virtual Cards**** are prepaid, reloadable, and usable in **over 200 countries** for online shopping. They're also compatible with **Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal**.

index_page_content: Top Up with Cryptocurrencies Like Bitcoin and USDT
content: Recarregue com Criptomoedas como Bitcoin e USDT

index_page_content: You can fund your Bitsika Virtual Card using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and USDT on supported networks such as BTC, ERC20 or BEP20. Once Bitcoin or USDT is deposited into your Bitsika balance, you can immediately use it to create or top up your virtual cards. Funding with crypto lets you create and use your card from any country without relying on traditional banking or mobile money. It's fast, flexible, and works globally.
content: Você pode financiar seu Cartão Virtual Bitsika usando criptomoedas como Bitcoin e USDT em redes suportadas como BTC, ERC20 ou BEP20. Assim que Bitcoin ou USDT for depositado no seu saldo Bitsika, você pode usá-lo imediatamente para criar ou recarregar seus cartões virtuais. Financiar com cripto permite que você crie e use seu cartão de qualquer lugar do Brasil sem depender de bancos tradicionais. É rápido, flexível e funciona globalmente.

index_page_content: You do not need to submit any KYC documents, phone number, or ID verification to create and use a Bitsika Virtual Card. A simple shopping card powered by crypto should not require complicated paperwork, and our users love this convenience. You can go from downloading the app to having a ready-to-use card in just 5 minutes.
content: Os Cartões Virtuais Bitsika requerem verificação KYC para conformidade, mas o processo é rápido e simplificado. A maioria dos usuários brasileiros tem seu KYC aprovado em cerca de 1 hora após o envio de documentos válidos como CPF. Essa verificação rápida garante que você possa começar a usar seu cartão quase imediatamente, mantendo os padrões de conformidade necessários.

index_page_content: Apple Pay, Google Pay and PayPal Support

You can use your Bitsika Virtual Card on digital wallets like Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal for seamless online transactions. Here's how to set it up:  

1. Generate your virtual card on the Bitsika platform.  

2. Add the card to your preferred wallet on Apple Pay, Google Pay, or PayPal.  

3. Once approved, your card will be ready for secure payments through the wallet.  

Now you can enjoy hassle-free spending wherever these wallets are accepted.
content: Seu Cartão Virtual Bitsika funciona em mais de 200 países em todo o mundo. Seja para compras online, assinaturas de serviços ou pagamentos internacionais, seu cartão é aceito onde quer que a Visa seja aceita. Para usuários brasileiros, isso significa acesso conveniente a plataformas internacionais que podem ter limitações com cartões bancários locais.

index_page_content: Use on OnlyFans for Added Privacy
content: Adicione ao Apple Pay, Google Pay e PayPal

index_page_content: A Bitsika Virtual Visa card is one of the safest and most discreet ways to pay for OnlyFans. You can create your card using an alias, which hides your real identity when subscribing. This ensures OnlyFans does not appear on your personal bank or mobile money statements. Funding the card with cryptocurrency like Bitcoin and USDT adds another layer of privacy, giving you a secure and anonymous payment method from anywhere in the world.
content: Você pode adicionar seu Cartão Virtual Bitsika ao Apple Pay, Google Pay e até mesmo ao PayPal. Essa integração oferece aos usuários brasileiros flexibilidade adicional para pagamentos móveis e online. Uma vez adicionado a essas plataformas, você pode usar seu cartão financiado com cripto em qualquer lugar que aceite esses métodos de pagamento.

index_page_content: Bitsika Virtual Cards are prepaid, meaning you load a custom amount before using them. This gives you the flexibility to create cards with the exact funds needed by you. We offer two types:  Standard Prepaid Cards: Ideal for one-time online payments. Generated instantly, they can only be topped up once after creation.  Premium Prepaid Cards: Perfect for recurring transactions and long-term use. These can be reloaded indefinitely, offering a convenient and reliable payment option. Loved by our users, 70% choose Premium Cards for their flexibility.
content: Os Cartões Virtuais Bitsika são pré-pagos, o que significa que você controla exatamente quanto gastar. Carregue seu cartão com o valor desejado usando cripto, e use-o até que o saldo acabe. Não há risco de gastos excessivos ou dívidas. Para usuários brasileiros, isso oferece uma maneira conveniente e controlada de gerenciar gastos internacionais.

index_page_content: Bitsika Visa Debit Cards are Virtual

The Bitsika Virtual Card is a digital Visa debit card with a card number, expiry date, and CVV like a regular card, but no physical form. As a debit card, every payment comes directly from your loaded balance, so you can only spend what you fund. The cards are issued by Visa, making them globally accepted for online payments and mobile wallets like Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. You can top up instantly with Bitcoin or USDT and manage everything inside the Bitsika app.
content: Com a Bitsika, você pode criar cartões virtuais ilimitados. Precisa de um cartão para assinaturas, outro para compras e outro para testes? Sem problema. Cada cartão pode ser gerenciado separadamente, oferecendo aos usuários brasileiros máxima flexibilidade e organização para diferentes necessidades de pagamento.

index_page_content: Cards are Instant (Takes 5 Minutes to Create)

Bitsika Virtual Cards can be used immediately after creation. No KYC is required, so you can go from sign-up to using your card within 5 minutes of downloading the app. In fact, 60% of users create their card within that time. After creation, you receive your card number, CVV, billing address, and expiry date, so you can start paying online right away.
content: Os Cartões Premium Bitsika são recarregáveis, permitindo que você adicione fundos sempre que necessário. Diferentemente dos cartões de uso único, os cartões Premium podem ser usados repetidamente, tornando-os ideais para assinaturas recorrentes e uso regular. Para usuários brasileiros que fazem pagamentos internacionais frequentes, isso oferece conveniência e economia de tempo.

index_page_content: Bitsika offers both Visa Gift Cards and Virtual Visa Debit Cards. A Visa Gift Card comes with a fixed balance for one time or limited use and cannot be reloaded once spent, but you can fund it with Bitcoin, USDT or other crypto.  A Virtual Visa Debit Card is reloadable and flexible, letting you top up with crypto anytime for subscriptions, online shopping and daily payments. With features like balance management, freeze and unfreeze and instant reloads, the Virtual Visa Debit Card gives you more control, while the Gift Card is best for simple one off payments or gifting.
content: Cada Cartão Virtual Bitsika Premium pode ser recarregado com até $500.000 por mês. Esse limite alto acomoda tanto usuários individuais quanto pequenas empresas brasileiras que precisam processar volumes significativos de transações internacionais. Seja para compras pessoais ou despesas empresariais, a Bitsika oferece capacidade suficiente.

index_page_content: Each Bitsika Virtual Visa card can be topped up with as much as $500,000 per month, giving you the freedom to handle high-value transactions with ease. There's no cap on how many individual cards you can create, so you can separate spending across different cards for shopping, subscriptions, business expenses, or personal use. This combination of high limits and unlimited card creation gives you flexibility that most other virtual card providers simply do not offer.
content: Todas as transações com Cartão Virtual Bitsika são protegidas por criptografia SSL de nível bancário e conformidade PCI DSS. Seus dados de pagamento e informações pessoais permanecem seguros. Para usuários brasileiros preocupados com segurança em pagamentos internacionais, a Bitsika oferece proteção robusta e tranquilidade.
Comece em Poucas Horas do Brasil

index_page_content: With Bitsika, you stay in full control of your virtual cards. Freeze or unfreeze them instantly, create as many as you need for different purposes, and hide or reveal sensitive details like the card number or CVV at any time. The app is protected with a PIN for secure access, and you receive real-time transaction notifications so you can spot any suspicious activity right away. If your card details are ever compromised, you can replace them instantly to keep your payments secure. Key security features: Freeze and unfreeze cards instantly, Create unlimited virtual cards for different purposes, Hide or reveal sensitive card details anytime, App protected with a secure PIN, Real-time transaction notifications, Instantly replace card details if compromised.

content: Seja você um freelancer brasileiro recebendo pagamentos internacionais, um estudante pagando por cursos online, um trader de cripto querendo gastar seus ativos, ou um empreendedor gerenciando assinaturas de SaaS, os Cartões Virtuais Bitsika atendem às suas necessidades. index_page_content: Who is the Bitsika Virtual Card for?
content: Para quem é o Cartão Virtual Bitsika?

index_page_content: The Bitsika Virtual Visa Card is designed for a wide variety of users who need fast, flexible, and secure payments. Freelancers can spend their crypto earnings directly online, while international students can pay for tuition, subscriptions, and services without being limited by local bank restrictions. Gamers benefit from instant access to credits, top-ups, and in-game items on global platforms, and online shoppers can purchase from international e-commerce sites that might not accept local payment methods. Content subscribers on platforms like OnlyFans, as well as streaming or SaaS services, enjoy the privacy and discretion of paying with an alias. Remote workers and digital nomads use Bitsika across more than 200 countries, while entrepreneurs and small businesses can create multiple cards to manage staff or project expenses. Privacy-conscious users also prefer Bitsika since transactions remain separate from their personal bank records. With instant creation, Bitcoin and USDT funding, and no KYC required, Bitsika is a modern solution that serves anyone who wants a powerful alternative to traditional bank cards.
content: O Cartão Virtual Visa Bitsika é projetado para freelancers que desejam gastar ganhos em cripto diretamente, estudantes internacionais pagando por mensalidades e assinaturas, traders de cripto, compradores online comprando de sites de e-commerce internacionais, assinantes de conteúdo em plataformas como OnlyFans e serviços de streaming, empreendedores e pequenas empresas gerenciando despesas internacionais, trabalhadores remotos e usuários preocupados com privacidade.
